news.t: Nvidia Cements Its Quality Characteristics After Q1 Earnings Beat
Fidelity Quality Factor ETF Flies Under the Radar

holdings.infoBox: FQAL is an equity ETF with a total of 131 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.35%, Fidelity Cash Central Fund at 6.49%, Apple at 6.33%, Alphabet at 5.13%, and Microsoft at 4.26%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Quality Factor ETF (FQAL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity U.S. Quality Factor index. The fund tracks an index of fundamentally- selected large and mid- cap US companies that are weighted according to a tiered scheme. FQAL was launched on Sep 12, 2016 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Nvidia Cements Its Quality Characteristics After Q1 Earnings Beat
